title: Plate Amplification
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bp0g2","text":"For use in \"Obtaining pure cyanophage stock: plaque purification\"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":12,"length":52}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"0DE9B3FA8CD342BFB0EC133A7D560FA7","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/Obtaining-pure-cyanophage-stocks-liquid-assay-dqm5u5"}}}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"dpuho","text":"Use either the liquid amplification method (A) or the plate amplification method (B) in the \"Obtaining pure cyanophage stock: plaque purification\" protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":15,"length":31},{"key":1,"offset":93,"length":52}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"0A2B6D00DB4F42D0A91A00E398FFCC42","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/Liquid-Amplification-dq65zd"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"AD26A49326B5465CB4106417435A5094","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/Obtaining-pure-cyanophage-stocks-liquid-assay-dqm5u5"}}}}
steps: Prepare plaque assays with a dilution series of lysate from the final purification. Plates with confluent lysis of the host lawn (typically ca. 10 4 PFUs) can then be used to obtain cyanophage stocks by elution of phages from the plates.
Add 5 mL sterile seawater to the plate.
Scrape off the top agar layer into the seawater.
Remove agar and cell debris by centrifugation.
creator: Amy Chan
